mapper.sql: select u.upload_id, u.biz_date, u.streamer_id, s.stage_name, u.upload_type, u.file_path, u.raw_text, u.ai_status, u.ai_result, u.upload_by, su.nick_name as upload_by_name, u.create_time, u.update_time from live_upload u left join live_streamer s on s.streamer_id = u.streamer_id left join sys_user su on su.user_id = u.upload_by
mapper.select: order by u.biz_date desc, u.upload_id desc

select date_format(u.biz_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as bizDate, u.streamer_id as streamerId, s.stage_name as stageName, sum(case when u.upload_type = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as giftCount, sum(case when u.upload_type = '2' then 1 else 0 end) as chatCount, sum(case when u.upload_type = '3' then 1 else 0 end) as reportCount from live_upload u left join live_streamer s on s.streamer_id = u.streamer_id
group by u.biz_date, u.streamer_id, s.stage_name order by u.biz_date desc, u.streamer_id
mapper.insert: insert into live_upload (biz_date, streamer_id, upload_type, file_path, raw_text, ai_status, upload_by, create_time) values (#{bizDate}, #{streamerId}, #{uploadType}, #{filePath}, #{rawText}, '0', #{uploadBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from live_upload where upload_id in #{id}
mapper.update: update live_upload set ai_status = #{aiStatus}, ai_result = #{aiResult}, update_time = sysdate() where upload_id = #{uploadId}
update live_upload set biz_date = #{bizDate}, update_time = sysdate() where upload_id = #{uploadId}
update live_daily_report set biz_date = #{bizDate}, update_time = sysdate() where upload_id = #{uploadId}
mapper.insert: insert into live_customer (streamer_id, nickname, badge, first_seen_date, last_seen_date, create_by, create_time) values (#{upload.streamerId}, #{nickname}, #{badge}, #{upload.bizDate}, #{upload.bizDate}, #{upload.updateBy}, sysdate()) on duplicate key update badge = if(badge = '', values(badge), badge), last_seen_date = values(last_seen_date), update_by = #{upload.updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select customer_id from live_customer where nickname = #{nickname} and streamer_id = #{streamerId} and merged_into_id is null limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into live_gift_record (biz_date, streamer_id, customer_id, xu, rank_no, upload_id, confirm_status, ai_confidence, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{upload.bizDate}, #{upload.streamerId}, #{customerId}, #{xu}, #{rankNo}, #{upload.uploadId}, '1', '1', sysdate(), #{upload.updateBy}, sysdate()) on duplicate key update xu = values(xu), rank_no = values(rank_no), upload_id = values(upload_id), confirm_status = '1', update_by = #{upload.updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()

insert into live_chat_contact (biz_date, streamer_id, customer_id, upload_id, has_interaction, create_time) values (#{upload.bizDate}, #{upload.streamerId}, #{customerId}, #{upload.uploadId}, #{hasInteraction}, sysdate()) on duplicate key update upload_id = values(upload_id), has_interaction = greatest(has_interaction, values(has_interaction))

insert into live_daily_report (biz_date, streamer_id, total_xu, raw_text, upload_id, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{upload.bizDate}, #{upload.streamerId}, #{totalXu}, #{rawText}, #{upload.uploadId}, sysdate(), #{upload.updateBy}, sysdate()) on duplicate key update total_xu = values(total_xu), raw_text = values(raw_text), upload_id = values(upload_id), update_by = #{upload.updateBy}, update_time = sysdate()
